case_title: HOUSING AUTHORITY OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. MITCHELL, ROLANDA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, ROLANDA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, ROLANDA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-18-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PRO TEM JUDGE:DAVID YANG;CLERK:ECLAVERIA;RPTR:BRENDA FILEDS 3:15PM:C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PRESENT:PLFF THRU COUNSEL KEVIN M. CLARKE AND DEFT ROLANDA MITCHELL APPEARING PROPER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF STIPULATION STATED ON RECORD, AS FOLLOWS: THAT THERE BE A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. DEFT AGREED TO PAY BACK RENT-CURRENTLY OWING IN AMOUNT OF $1232 (TO 5/31/95); DEFT TO PAY $530 FORTHWITH AND THEREAFTER TO PAY BY INSTALLMENT AT $117/MO FOR 6 MOS. BEGINNING 5/1/95. ONCE PAID, HOUSING AUTHORITY WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. DEFT TO REMAIN CCURRENT ON MONTHLY RENT; IF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH STIPULATION, DEFT AGREED THAT PLFF WILL FILE EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR DUE AMOUNT AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 3085 FOLSOM ST, #340, SF,CA.
